meaning: v.(使)枯萎,(使)憔悴,(使)畏缩n.枯萎,憔悴,畏缩
examples: Wilt thou then forget me quite?
Wilt thou did not love him?
Look at th' lad's legs, wilt tha'?
And since Schiff sees the dollar continuing to wilt, foreign debt is more than a wise short-term strategy.
Wild Irish Rose had begun to wilt, and Marvin Sands was considering selling out.
